summary: The diff implements all three requirements comprehensively. REQ-1 (tap game with targets, timer, score, game-over screen) is fully implemented in useGameState.ts, GameCanvas.tsx, and related components. REQ-2 (backend high score persistence with get/set, display on HUD and game-over screen) is implemented in backend/main.mo and useQueries.ts. REQ-3 (arcade visual theme, neon colors, animations, mobile layout) is implemented in index.css, tailwind.config.js, and all UI components. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features were found beyond one non-goal being partially implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: InternetIdentityProvider and full Internet Identity authentication infrastructure is included (useInternetIdentity.ts, AuthClient setup, identity-aware actor creation), despite the build request explicitly listing 'User authentication or Internet Identity login' as a non-goal.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request lists 'User authentication or Internet Identity login' as a non-goal. The diff includes a full InternetIdentityProvider, AuthClient integration, and identity-based actor creation which goes beyond what was requested.
